title: Muskets 3D Wild West for Ewewkek's
description: This texture pack changes 2D muskets to 3D muskets wild west
body:
![m](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/239f2ea395661d8e3b3519aba81334d5f42f9889.png)

**This texture pack changes 2D muskets to 3D muskets**

**Experience a new dimension of realism! This texture pack meticulously replaces every flat, 2D musket with intricately crafted 3D models. Watch as they gain tangible depth, realistic shadows, and a commanding presence in your hands.**

- Itemphysics Compatible!
- [Ewewkek's Musket](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ewewukeks-musket-mod) Mod is required for this resourcepack to work!


![m](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/239f2ea395661d8e3b3519aba81334d5f42f9889.png)

**Support mod:**
- [Ewewukek's Musket Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ewewukeks-musket-mod)
